Name ______________________________Date ______________

Circle the Fire Hazards - Answer Key

Find unsafe choices in the kitchen

Answer Guide: Review the five fire hazards below.

Five fire hazards

1Towel hanging beside the hot stove
2Cooking pot left boiling on the burner
3Overloaded electrical outlet and power strips
4Water spilled beside electrical cords
5Lit candle next to the curtain
Safety reminder: If there is a fire, get outside, stay outside, and call 911 from a safe place.
Suggested answersdownthehallresources.com
